Title: Aspirator Bottles
Overview:
The Bottles product line offers laboratory-grade borosilicate glass bottles suited for reagent, media, and solution storage. Capacities range up to 20 L, with options including standard reagent or solution bottles and variants with aspirator outlets or stoppers. The bottles are fabricated for chemical compatibility, pressure stability (within typical lab ranges), and clarity for content visibility. Reagent bottles, media bottles, and solution bottles are offered in multiple sizes and neck diameters to suit varying lab needs. Custom fabrication for large sizes or specialized designs is possible. The range supports applications in chemical, biological, and analytical laboratories where durable, clean, inert storage is required.

Key Features:
Borosilicate glass construction
Vacuum compatible
Various sizes available
Chemical resistant

Specifications:
• Maximum capacity: up to 20 L
• Material: borosilicate glass 3.3 (chemical-resistant, thermally stable)
• Variants: standard reagent bottle, media / solution bottle, aspirator bottle with outlet, stopper-equipped bottles
• Dimensions: multiple outer diameters (O.D.) and heights depending on size
• Neck inner diameters: matching standard stopper sizes
• Outlet I.D.: for aspirator and stopcock variants
• Compatibility: vacuum or mild pressure (within material limits)
• Fabrication tolerance: precision glass forming to maintain sealability and interchangeability
• Optional: customization for specific neck sizes, ports, or accessories

Applications:
• Storage and handling of reagents, solvents, and media
• Use in analytical labs, synthesis labs, and pilot labs
• Handling aspirated liquids or vacuum-driven processes (aspirator bottles)
• Use as intermediate collection vessels or feed reservoirs
• Safe chemical containment for corrosive or reactive substances
The bottles serve as essential consumable infrastructure across R&D, production, quality control, and educational labs.
